title: eragrostis nilgiriensis
intro: Eragrostis nilgiriensis, also known as Nilgiri grass or Nilgiri bunchgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the Western Ghats in India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eragrostis nilgiriensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis nilgiriensis typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can be used in traditional medicine or as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
